caption:
Looking for things to do in Florida? 👀 This spot (plus 1,000+ more) is in my Florida Travel Guide + Interactive Map perfect for weekend getaways, road trips, and exploring without hours of research and stress! 💬 Comment “GUIDE” and I’ll send it to you!

Mossy Hollow Market has officially opened its enchanted woodland gates — fairies, sprites, mushroom magic, potions bar, wandering characters & so much more 🍄

📍 1501 W State Rd 60, Plant City, FL 33567

🕙 10AM–5PM today only 

💫 Costumes highly encouraged + free parking!

🎟️ $10 entry at the door (kids 12 & under free) 

From woodland vendors and mystical experiences to a mushroom parade and wishing cauldron — this forest market is everything you didn’t know you needed today! 🍃✨

#MossyHollow #PlantCityFL #EnchantedMarket #FairyCore #WoodlandVibes
